segments.scene_description: A stationary first-person view focused on an animated digital billboard in an urban game environment. The billboard cycles between displaying a full advertisement for a boxing-themed single with the text 'I'LL KNOCK THE DEVIL OUT OF YOU' and showing only the portrait image of the muscular figure. Modern commercial buildings with glass facades stand in the background under a partly cloudy sky, with no pedestrians or vehicles present.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary first-person perspective on a digital billboard that cycles through different states of a commercial advertisement. It begins with the billboard displaying a full boxing-themed promotion featuring the bold text I'LL KNOCK THE DEVIL OUT OF YOU. As the animation progresses, the text vanishes to reveal only the portrait image of a muscular figure. The scene remains fixed against a backdrop of modern glass commercial buildings under a partly cloudy sky, emphasizing the stillness of the empty urban environment.
